entry_rule: BUY debit call spread near mid on pullback day (trend up).
exit_rule: TP: sell at 50% max profit (spread≈3.38); SL: sell if spread≤0.88 OR close<EMA21 (≈469.01); Time-stop: exit by 21 days.

entry_rule: SELL credit call spread near mid on pullup day (trend down).
exit_rule: TP: buy back at 50% max profit (spread≈0.30); SL: buy back if spread≥1.19 OR close>EMA21 (≈3.92); Time-stop: exit by 21 days.
